_metadata.title: Authorised representatives of providers of high-risk AI systems

obligations.source_quote: Prior to making their high-risk AI systems available on the Union market, providers established in third countries shall, by written mandate, appoint an authorised representative which is established in the Union.
obligations.addressee_note: Provider established in a third country (non-EU)

decomposed_atoms.description: Non-EU provider must appoint an EU-based authorised representative by written mandate
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Third-country providers SHALL appoint an authorised representative established in the Union by written mandate, prior to making systems available on the Union market

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: Authorised representative documentation, mandate agreements, EU representative contact details

obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to providers established in third countries (non-EU)

obligations.source_quote: The provider shall enable its authorised representative to perform the tasks specified in the mandate received from the provider.
obligations.addressee_note: Provider that has appointed an authorised representative

decomposed_atoms.description: Provider must enable the authorised representative to perform mandate tasks
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL enable its authorised representative to perform the tasks specified in the mandate

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: Mandate scope documentation, representative access and authority records

obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to providers established in third countries

obligations.source_quote: The authorised representative shall perform the tasks specified in the mandate received from the provider.
obligations.addressee_note: Authorised representative of a third-country provider

decomposed_atoms.description: Authorised representative must perform the tasks in the mandate
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The authorised representative SHALL perform the tasks specified in the mandate

decomposed_atoms.description: Provide a copy of the mandate to the AI Office upon request
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The authorised representative SHALL provide a copy of the mandate to the AI Office upon request, in one of the official languages of the institutions of the Union

decomposed_atoms.description: Verify EU declaration of conformity and technical documentation exist and conformity assessment was carried out
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The authorised representative SHALL verify that the EU declaration of conformity (Art. 47) and technical documentation (Art. 11) have been drawn up and an appropriate conformity assessment procedure has been carried out by the provider

decomposed_atoms.description: Keep provider contact details, declaration, technical documentation and certificate for 10 years
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The authorised representative SHALL keep at the disposal of competent authorities, for 10 years after the system has been placed on the market or put into service: provider contact details, EU declaration of conformity, technical documentation, and if applicable the notified body certificate

decomposed_atoms.description: Provide all information and documentation necessary to demonstrate conformity upon reasoned request
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The authorised representative SHALL provide a competent authority, upon a reasoned request, with all information and documentation necessary to demonstrate conformity, including access to automatically generated logs to the extent under the provider's control

decomposed_atoms.description: Cooperate with competent authorities on any action related to the high-risk AI system
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The authorised representative SHALL cooperate with competent authorities, upon a reasoned request, in any action they take in relation to the high-risk AI system, in particular to reduce and mitigate risks

decomposed_atoms.description: Comply with registration obligations or ensure registration information is correct
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The authorised representative SHALL, where applicable, comply with registration obligations (Art. 49(1)), or if registration is carried out by the provider, ensure the information in Annex VIII Section A point 3 is correct

decomposed_atoms.description: Terminate mandate if provider is acting contrary to its obligations
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The authorised representative SHALL terminate the mandate if it considers or has reason to consider the provider to be acting contrary to its obligations pursuant to this Regulation

decomposed_atoms.description: Immediately inform market surveillance authority and notified body about termination
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The authorised representative SHALL immediately inform the relevant market surveillance authority, and where applicable the relevant notified body, about the termination of the mandate and the reasons therefor

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: Mandate task completion records, document retention systems, authority correspondence, registration records

obligations.source_quote: The mandate shall empower the authorised representative to be addressed, in addition to or instead of the provider, by the competent authorities, on all issues related to ensuring compliance with this Regulation.
obligations.addressee_note: Provider that drafts the mandate for its authorised representative

decomposed_atoms.description: The mandate must empower the representative to be addressed by competent authorities on all compliance issues
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The mandate SHALL empower the authorised representative to be addressed, in addition to or instead of the provider, by the competent authorities, on all issues related to ensuring compliance

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: Mandate agreement scope, authorised representative authority clauses

obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to providers established in third countries
